title: Ping Mod
body:
# Ping Mod – Quick Communication Made Easy

Ping Mod is a lightweight and easy-to-use mod for Minecraft **1.20.1** that lets you place visual pings in the world to help with communication and navigation. Perfect for multiplayer teamwork or solo exploration, this mod makes it easy to point things out quickly without needing to type or explain.

## How to Use:

- Press **H** (default keybind) to place a ping where you're looking.
- The ping will appear in the world as a visible marker for nearby players to see.

> **Important Tip:**  
> Make sure your **Entity Render Distance** is turned up in your video settings, or you might not see pings that are far away.
